regional_cost_note: Electricians in Auckland typically charge $90–$140/hr. Emergency callouts and after-hours work add $100–$200. Always verify EWRB registration before work begins.

businesses.name: Grammar Electrical
businesses.known_for: Auckland's largest electrical jobbing company; family-owned since 1948 with 51–200 staff, Safepower Assured status and $20k workmanship guarantee.

businesses.name: Northern Lights Electrical
businesses.known_for: Certified Master Electricians covering residential, commercial and retail across all of Auckland; North Shore to South Auckland.

businesses.name: Helix Electrical
businesses.known_for: Family-owned; licensed electricians known for reliable service and clear communication across Auckland, Bay of Plenty, and Waikato.

businesses.name: Aotea Electric Auckland
businesses.known_for: Major Auckland electrical contractor with 24/7 emergency response; EV charging, solar, and industrial work.

businesses.name: Laser Electrical Auckland
businesses.known_for: National franchise with strong Auckland presence; praised for professionalism and follow-through from initial call to job completion.

businesses.name: Silverlake Electrical
businesses.known_for: Trusted North Auckland electricians specialising in new builds, renovations, and smart home automation.

businesses.name: Endeavour Electrical
businesses.known_for: Residential and commercial electrical work with strong customer service and transparent quoting.
